name: Grade 1 Art & Creativity — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for line, shape, color, texture, and purposeful artmaking. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in line, shape, color, texture, and purposeful artmaking.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore line, shape, color, texture, and purposeful artmaking
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record line, shape, color, texture, and purposeful artmaking by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.title: Practice line, shape, color, texture, and purposeful artmaking
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record line, shape, color, texture, and purposeful artmaking by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

resources.title: National Core Arts Standards
resources.description: Planning reference for this Grade 1 Art & Creativity pathway.

units.title: Investigate: line, shape, color, texture, and purposeful artmaking
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about line, shape, color, texture, and purposeful artmaking?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record line, shape, color, texture, and purposeful artmaking.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore line, shape, color, texture, and purposeful artmaking
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record line, shape, color, texture, and purposeful artmaking by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record line, shape, color, texture, and purposeful artmaking. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to line, shape, color, texture, and purposeful artmaking.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
